nasb.text: Fight the good fight of faith; take hold of the eternal life to which you were called, and you made the good confession in the presence of many witnesses.

esv.text: Fight the good fight of the faith. Take hold of the eternal life to which you were called and about which you made the good confession in the presence of many witnesses.

cnv.text: 要為信仰打那美好的仗，持定永生；你是為這永生而蒙召的，又在許多的證人面前承認過美好的信仰。

ccb.text: 要为真道打美好的仗，要持定永生。你是为永生蒙召的，并在许多见证人面前做过美好的见证。

csbs.text: 要为信仰打那美好的仗， 要抓住永恒的生命。 你正是为此蒙召的， 并且在许多见证人面前 做了美好的告白。
